title: NC's Revive
description: Another revive mod with simple mini game.
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95836e3b56f56c7822eeabfa91cd97e9e9ef4a09.png)
# Review
NumaCrystal's revive is a mod that adds a critical state to the game - the ability to get a second chance before dying. The mod adds both the ability to self revive and the ability to revive another player.
## Self-revive mechanics
With this mod, not only can you stay put while waiting for help, but you can also try to revive yourself with a simple mini-game where you have to hit the center of the screen, like in Dead by Daylight! The more times you lose in the mini-game, the less time you have left before you die; the more times you hit, the more chances you have to get up.

![Demo of the mini-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/878f63b670884c8ffc43931ef52ad3454018e563.gif)
## Safely revive other players
You can also wait for another player - and they will help you revive safely. But be careful: you only have 30 seconds before you die.
